case_title: LOPEZ KIRSTEN VS CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,410.50 FILED BY LOPEZ KIRSTEN AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ KIRSTEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
